question:
[Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a deployment readiness checklist for the new features, Markdown format, save to day24/. Include checklist items for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan. Add YAML frontmatter.

content.text:
[Tue 2026-03-17 04:24 EDT] [Previous Feedback] Correct!

Please create a deployment readiness checklist for the new features, Markdown format, save to day24/. Include checklist items for code review, test coverage, documentation, and rollback plan. Add YAML frontmatter.

arguments.content:
---
created_at: 2026-04-16T08:00:00+08:00
author: metaclaw_agent
status: ready
---

# Deployment Readiness Checklist — New Features

Use this checklist before enabling or rolling out the new features (including the new dashboard).

## Code Review

- [ ] PR(s) approved by required reviewers (backend + frontend as applicable)
- [ ] Architecture/ADR updated if changes affect core workflows
- [ ] No TODO/FIXME left in production paths (or tracked with tickets)
- [ ] Security review completed for auth, permissions, and data exposure

## Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated for new logic and edge cases
- [ ] Integration tests updated and passing (CI green)
- [ ] API contract checks (request/response schema) validated for `/projects` and `/tasks`
- [ ] Load/performance validation completed (baseline vs. new dashboard)

## Documentation

- [ ] API documentation updated (endpoints, fields, error codes)
- [ ] Feature flag documentation updated (what it gates, defaults, rollout plan)
- [ ] Runbook updated (operational steps, known failure modes)
- [ ] Release notes drafted (user-facing changes + limitations)

## Rollback Plan

- [ ] Feature flags allow immediate disable (e.g., `new_dashboard=false`)
- [ ] Rollback procedure documented (what to revert, in what order)
- [ ] Database rollback/migration plan confirmed (forward-only migrations handled)
- [ ] Monitoring/alerts defined to trigger rollback (error rate, latency, key user flows)
- [ ] Owner/on-call identified for rollout window

## Final Pre-Deploy Checks

- [ ] Configuration changes reviewed and versioned
- [ ] Smoke test plan prepared (critical paths)
- [ ] Backup/restore procedure verified (if applicable)
- [ ] Post-deploy validation checklist prepared

arguments.command: printf "2026-03-17T04:24:32-04:00 | task_id=deployment_readiness_checklist | Created day24/20260416_deployment_readiness_checklist.md (deployment checklist: code review, test coverage, docs, rollback plan).\n" >> done.log
